ec2.ec2fleet.placement.CfnAbout: Describes the placement of an instance.

ec2.ec2fleet.placement.Affinity.Description: The affinity setting for the instance on the Dedicated Host.  This parameter is not supported for [CreateFleet](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/APIReference/API_CreateFleet) or [ImportInstance](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/APIReference/API_ImportInstance.html).

ec2.ec2fleet.placement.AvailabilityZone.Description: The Availability Zone of the instance.  If not specified, an Availability Zone will be automatically chosen for you based on the load balancing criteria for the Region.  This parameter is not supported for [CreateFleet](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/APIReference/API_CreateFleet).

ec2.ec2fleet.placement.GroupName.Description: The name of the placement group that the instance is in. If you specify `GroupName`, you can't specify `GroupId`.

ec2.ec2fleet.placement.HostId.Description: The ID of the Dedicated Host on which the instance resides.  This parameter is not supported for [CreateFleet](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/APIReference/API_CreateFleet) or [ImportInstance](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/APIReference/API_ImportInstance.html).

ec2.ec2fleet.placement.HostResourceGroup.Description: The ARN of the host resource group in which to launch the instances.  If you specify this parameter, either omit the **Tenancy** parameter or set it to `host`.  This parameter is not supported for [CreateFleet](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/APIReference/API_CreateFleet).

ec2.ec2fleet.placement.PartitionNumber.Description: The number of the partition that the instance is in. Valid only if the placement group strategy is set to `partition`.  This parameter is not supported for [CreateFleet](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/APIReference/API_CreateFleet).

ec2.ec2fleet.placement.Tenancy.Description: The tenancy of the instance. An instance with a tenancy of `dedicated` runs on single-tenant hardware.  This parameter is not supported for [CreateFleet](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/APIReference/API_CreateFleet). The `host` tenancy is not supported for [ImportInstance](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/APIReference/API_ImportInstance.html) or for T3 instances that are configured for the `unlimited` CPU credit option.
